node.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Niagara Falls") on Niagara Falls Day Trip (Score: 1.00)

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 3 > Day 3 > Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
node.description: Large museum featuring natural history, world cultures, and extensive permanent collections including dinosaurs, minerals, and cultural artifacts. Indoor exhibits spanning archaeology, paleontology, and decorative arts.

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

node.name: Full-Day Workshop
node.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 3 > Day 7 > Royal Ontario Museum

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.
